tokens.text: Dawn met Bernard, a.k.a. Bear,

translation.text: Dawn conheceu Bernard, também conhecido como Bear

tokens.text: through a mutual friend called May

translation.text: por meio de uma amiga em comum chamada May

tokens.text: He is cute and sweet

translation.text: Ele é fofo e doce

tokens.text: but I'm not sure he is your type

translation.text: mas não tenho certeza se ele é seu tipo

tokens.text: However, as soon as Dawn saw Bear

translation.text: Porém, assim que Dawn viu Bear

tokens.text: she knew he was exactly her type

translation.text: ela soube que ele era exatamente o tipo dela

tokens.text: He was not cute but extremely handsome

translation.text: Ele não era fofo, mas extremamente bonito

tokens.text: and he was as sweet as an apple pie

translation.text: e era tão doce quanto uma torta de maçã

tokens.text: Dawn loved apple pies

translation.text: Dawn amava tortas de maçã

tokens.text: In brief, Bear was the perfect guy

translation.text: Resumindo, Bear era o cara perfeito

tokens.text: Bear was also extremely funny

tokens.text: which was the best thing

translation.text: o que era a melhor coisa

tokens.text: Whatever the subject

translation.text: Qualquer que fosse o assunto

tokens.text: he always managed to slip in a few jokes

translation.text: ele sempre conseguia encaixar algumas piadas

tokens.text: He could say the most outrageous thing without blinking

translation.text: Ele conseguia dizer a coisa mais absurda sem piscar

tokens.text: and his deadpan delivery

tokens.text: of the most ridiculous sentence was hilarious

translation.text: da frase mais ridícula era hilária

tokens.text: He would barely move a muscle when saying things such as

tokens.text: and get goosebumps

tokens.text: They are developing a mind-reading machine

tokens.text: that can instantly publish all your thoughts on the dark web

tokens.text: Forget Republicans and Democrats

tokens.text: to ensure compliance with government policies

tokens.text: and also to make us love cats

tokens.text: Never walk barefoot outside

tokens.text: to accurately measure their performance at work

tokens.text: Genetically modified squirrels

tokens.text: have been slashing the tires on people's cars in Canada

tokens.text: That is why they are usually so secretive

tokens.text: she was usually very restrained

translation.text: Sua personalidade calorosa e carinhosa

tokens.text: Doesn't it annoy you

tokens.text: Oh, my head hurts

translation.text: Ah, minha cabeça está doendo

tokens.text: And yet, you know that people do believe in crazy stuff

translation.text: E, no entanto, você sabe que as pessoas acreditam em coisas malucas

tokens.text: That's literally your job right now

translation.text: Esse é literalmente o seu trabalho agora

tokens.text: May said

translation.text: May disse

tokens.text: People's minds are amazing

translation.text: As mentes das pessoas são incríveis

tokens.text: they can create the most wonderful and outrageous things

translation.text: elas podem criar as coisas mais maravilhosas e absurdas

tokens.text: Dawn took a deep breath

translation.text: Dawn respirou fundo

tokens.text: She realized her mind was not so much different

translation.text: Ela percebeu que sua mente não era muito diferente

tokens.text: from those of people who believed in crazy conspiracy theories

translation.text: das (mentes) das pessoas que acreditavam em teorias conspiratórias malucas

tokens.text: She wanted to believe that Bear was the perfect guy

translation.text: Ela queria acreditar que Bear era o cara perfeito

tokens.text: so she refused to see the truth

translation.text: então se recusou a ver a verdade

tokens.text: but now there was no excuse

translation.text: mas agora não havia desculpa

tokens.text: Bear was handsome and had a very good heart

translation.text: Bear era bonito e tinha um coração muito bom

tokens.text: but he was also completely nuts

translation.text: mas também era completamente maluco

tokens.text: After a long day of work, reading, and hearing the most outrageous things

translation.text: Depois de um longo dia de trabalho, lendo e ouvindo as coisas mais absurdas

tokens.text: Dawn would meet Bear for dinner at their favorite Greek restaurant and smile

translation.text: Dawn encontrava Bear para jantar em seu restaurante grego favorito e sorria

tokens.text: Did you know that cockroaches invented potato chips

translation.text: Você sabia que as baratas inventaram as batatas chips

tokens.text: They also invented fortune cookies

translation.text: Elas também inventaram os biscoitos da sorte

tokens.text: Bear would say, and Dawn would smile

translation.text: Bear dizia, e Dawn sorria

tokens.text: Now the government can even make a sculpture come to life

translation.text: Agora o governo pode até uma escultura ter vida

tokens.text: Using extraterrestrial technology, of course

translation.text: Usando tecnologia extraterrestre, é claro

tokens.text: Bear would say, and Dawn would smile

translation.text: Bear dizia, e Dawn sorria

tokens.text: Take care with what you say when you open the refrigerator

translation.text: Tome cuidado com o que você diz ao abrir a geladeira

tokens.text: it probably has a hidden camera and microphone to spy on you

translation.text: ela provavelmente tem uma câmera escondida e um microfone para espionar você

tokens.text: Bear would say, and Dawn would smile

translation.text: Bear dizia, e Dawn sorria

tokens.text: Bear was not a perfect guy

translation.text: Bear não era um cara perfeito

tokens.text: well, no one is perfect

translation.text: bem, ninguém é perfeito

tokens.text: After thinking about it

translation.text: Depois de pensar sobre isso

tokens.text: Dawn decided not to leave him

translation.text: Dawn decidiu não deixá-lo

tokens.text: His good looks and good heart made him special

translation.text: Sua boa aparência e bom coração o tornavam especial

tokens.text: Also, Dawn now always had material with which to write her column

translation.text: Além disso, Dawn agora sempre tinha material para escrever sua coluna
